description: Shared test vectors for GovernanceAction canonical hashing. The client, server, and optimistic_governance contract must all produce the same sha256 hash for each vector's `action` field. See server/src/governance/actionSchema.ts and contracts/optimistic_governance/src/action.rs.

action.rationale: Pause USDC vault ahead of scheduled strategy migration

note: expectedHash placeholders are regenerated by `npm run governance:vectors` (server) which recomputes hashGovernanceAction(action) for every vector and rewrites this file. Do not hand-edit expectedHash values.
